original.citation: Bede's Death Song: The Hague Version
original.label: Sacred Texts original

label: Bede's Death Song: The Hague Version
partTitle: Bede's Death Song: The Hague Version

sections.label: Bede's Death Song: The Hague Version
sections.original:
Fore ðaem nedfere nenig wiorðeð
ðonosnottorra ðon him ðearf riae
to ymbhycgenne aer his hinionge
hwet his gaste godes oððe yfles
ester deaðdege doemed wiorðe.

volumeTitle: Bede's Death Song: The Hague Version
